The `SEND_MESSAGE` tool timed out with no error, confirmation, or message ID. 3. *Why can't we just mark it done or instantly retry?* The quality gate forbids reporting "done" without evidence. A blind retry risks duplicate messaging if the first send actually succeeded. 
4. *What worked?* The verification-before-completion hard gate successfully prevented a silent failure or an unverified assumption of success.
5. *What to change next run?* Implement a read/check step on the destination inbox (if accessible) to verify delivery before ever attempting a retry on a timeout.
